ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who led the experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the experiment belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scan_settings" (
  "scan_setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scan setting */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the scan setting belongs to */,
  "scan_mode" TEXT /* Scan mode used in the experiment */,
  "polarity" TEXT /* Polarity of the scan */,
  "ms_ms_type" TEXT /* MS/MS type used in the experiment */,
  "tims_id" INTEGER /* Tims ID used in the experiment */,
  "ion_source" TEXT /* Ion source used in the experiment */,
  "ionization_method" TEXT /* Ionization method used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scan_setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scan_settings_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peak_data" (
  "peak_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peak */,
  "scan_setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scan setting the peak belongs to */,
  "mz_calibration" REAL /* Mz calibration value */,
  "t1" REAL /* T1 value */,
  "t2" REAL /* T2 value */,
  "tims_calibration" REAL /* Tims calibration value */,
  "property_group" INTEGER /* Property group */,
  "accumulation_time" REAL /* Accumulation time */,
  "ramp_time" REAL /* Ramp time */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature */,
  "fragmentation_pattern" TEXT /* Fragmentation pattern */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peak_data_scan_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("scan_setting_id") REFERENCES scan_settings ("scan_setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peak_intensity" (
  "intensity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intensity measurement */,
  "peak_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peak the intensity belongs to */,
  "max_intensity" INTEGER /* Maximum intensity value */,
  "summed_intensities" INTEGER /* Summed intensities value */,
  "num_scans" INTEGER /* Number of scans */,
  "num_peaks" INTEGER /* Number of peaks */,
  "signal_to_noise_ratio" REAL /* Signal to noise ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intensity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peak_intensity_peak_id FOREIGN KEY ("peak_id") REFERENCES peak_data ("peak_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "peak_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peak accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the peak */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the peak was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the peak */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_peak_id FOREIGN KEY ("peak_id") REFERENCES peak_data ("peak_id")
)
